surface: Slice 8A candidate web network policy boundary
untrusted_input: URL hosts, redirect targets, and DNS-resolved socket addresses
authority_source: engine authority grants, direct fetch policy, reqwest resolver, and URL parser
deny_policy: unsupported schemes, local hostnames, credentials, fragments, unsafe IPv4/IPv6 literals, unsafe redirects, and unsafe DNS results fail closed
secret_or_token_policy: no secret custody; policy validates network targets only and does not store credentials, cookies, or sessions
test_evidence: web tests plus SACB inventory coverage

secret_or_token_policy: secrets remain in auth.json or Keychain and must be redacted from logs/diagnostics
